title: [MooreToCore] Fix the stack error caused by the uarray reftype.

features.name: multi-dimensional unpacked array with mixed packed/unpacked dimensions
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array declaration with both unpacked dimensions [0:N][0:M] and packed dimensions [A:0][B:0]

features.name: unpacked array slice assignment with chained bracket indexing
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array slice assignment using chained bracket notation like array[const][const] on a multi-dimensional unpacked array
